### Post by fraiddo on 2014-04-17

### Post by fraiddo on 2014-04-18
I do the command export PATH=${PATH}:"/home/fred/appli/android-studio/sdk/tools",

and I checked the file local.properties

# This file is automatically generated by Android Tools.
# Do not modify this file -- YOUR CHANGES WILL BE ERASED!
#
# This file must *NOT* be checked into Version Control Systems,
# as it contains information specific to your local configuration.


# location of the SDK. This is only used by Ant
# For customization when using a Version Control System, please read the
# header note.
sdk.dir=/home/fred/appli/android-studio/sdk

and he is correctly added, so i don't now what i can check fort search a solution...
